code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    process(s)
  when None
    print("total=0")
  end
end

fn process(_ s: String) -> Unit
  mut total = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        if string.len(current) > 0
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            if total + v <= 100
              total = total + v
            else
              print("total=#{total}")
              return
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(current) > 0
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      if total + v <= 100
        total = total + v
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  print("total=#{total}")
end
